This is a fantastic initiative! It sounds like Majestic Design has a lot of potential, and your father is smart to bring you in to streamline operations. Let's break down your goals and design some systems to tackle the disorganization and wasted time.
Here's a plan for your group chat, shared notes for equipment requests, and the daily check-in/check-out process, focusing on practical solutions for a contracting company.
Phase 1: Communication & Information Flow
System 1: Company-Wide Group Chat
Goal: Centralize quick communications, announcements, and urgent updates.
Recommended Platform: Consider a platform that offers both chat and document sharing capabilities, as this can simplify things later. Good options include:
context: From document: OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s… — chunk 12 (chunk 12/22)
